description: Screen manifest for the SolarOps UI catalog, captured by scripts/capture-screens.mjs. A screen has: id, title, macro (one-line purpose), detail (key controls/modals), group (catalog section). Reaching the screen: `noAuth:true` + `open` ({path,query}) for pre-login screens; otherwise `view` jumps via localStorage['solarflow_current_view'] after logging in. Optional `pre` runs actions before the shot: {clickText}, {click:selector}, {wait:ms}. Keep in sync with Layout.tsx allNavItems.

screens.title: Staff Login
screens.detail: LoginScreen. Email/password, Face ID/passkey button, Forgot password, Contractor Portal link.

screens.title: Forgot Password
screens.detail: LoginScreen showForgot state. Email input, sends reset link.

screens.title: Reset Password
screens.macro: Set a new password from email link.
screens.detail: ResetPasswordScreen. New + confirm password; verifies recovery token first.

screens.title: Contractor Login
screens.detail: ContractorLoginScreen. Separate auth from staff; register link.

screens.title: Ops Center
screens.detail: DispatchDashboard. Live work-order queue, technician status, alerts, today's schedule.

screens.title: Dashboard
screens.detail: Dashboard. Revenue/job KPIs, charts, recent activity, quick links.

screens.title: Customers
screens.detail: Customers. Search, customer cards, interaction history, links to SolarEdge sites and jobs.

screens.title: Lead Lobby
screens.detail: LeadLobby. Lead pipeline, assignment, conversion to customer/job.

screens.title: SolarEdge Sites
screens.detail: SolarEdgeMonitoring. Site list, power/energy columns (MonitoringColumnPicker), SiteProfilePanel on click, import modal.

screens.title: Work Orders
screens.detail: Jobs. Status filters, work-order rows, opens WorkOrderPanel / jobDetail. WorkOrderCalendar for scheduling.

screens.title: RMA Tracker
screens.detail: RMADashboard. RMA entries, status, RmaCreateModal.

screens.title: Billing
screens.detail: Billing. Unbilled badge, invoice creation, BillingReportModal, Xero integration.

screens.title: Contractor Pay
screens.detail: admin/BillingModule. Contractor invoices, approval, pay status.

screens.title: Service Rates
screens.detail: contractor/RateManagement. Rate cards per service type.

screens.title: Contractors
screens.detail: contractor/ContractorApprovals. Onboarding review, approve/reject, profile edit.

screens.title: New Install
screens.detail: SolarProjects. Project list, ProjectInstallationSection, ProjectPartsSection.

screens.title: Inventory
screens.detail: InventoryModule. Stock, receive form (warehouse field), receiving history, providers.

screens.title: Settings
screens.detail: Settings. UserPermissionsPanel, UserActivityLog, LogViewer, PhotoCleanupCard.

screens.title: Sales CRM
screens.detail: CRMDashboard. XP/levels/leaderboard, lead stages, activity logging. (sales role nav)

screens.title: Clients (Sales)
screens.detail: CustomerManagement. Client 360, interactions (calls/emails/SMS/notes/meetings). (sales role nav)

screens.title: Contractor Dashboard
screens.detail: ContractorDashboard. Timeframe tabs (Day/Week/Month/YTD), status chips (All/Queue/En Route/In Progress/Completed/On Hold); opens contractor JobDetail. Note: contractors who have not accepted the agreement first see the ConexSolTerms gate (shown in this capture).
